To emphasize on preventive eye care and build a personalized patient- doctor relationship. Our Vision To provide comprehensive eye care with highest standards of clinical and surgical expertise and ethics  with compassion and empathy. We plan to provide high quality medical services from qualified doctors with all Diagnostic Tests using latest equipments   under one roof. Dr. Sameer P. Sawant MBBS, MS, DNB (Ophthalmology), FVRS Vitreo Retina Surgeon Dr. Priya S. Sawant MBBS, DOMS, FGO Cataract & Glaucoma Surgeon View All Doctors Our Testimonials Both of my eye surgeries with Dr. Priya Sawant went exceptionally well. I am very happy with the results. Dr. Priya Sawant and her team made sure I was comfortable and well informed throughout the entire process which gave me confidence. Their professionalism and expertise were evident from the initial consultation to the post-operative care. The staff was polite and the hospital was neat and clean.
I highly recommend Dr.Priya Sawant for anyone considering eye surgery." jayshree bhite Our Certification Get in Touch Call us on +91 9833235386 Email us support@samartheyecare.org Services Cataract Retina Glaucoma Cornea Quick Links Home Gallery Feedback get in touch Samarth Eye Care, Aurum Enclave, 1st Floor, Nehru Road, Near P & T Colony, Opp, Vakola Masjid, Santacruz (E), Mumbai - 400 055 ....Branch - 1st Floor, Yashodhan Building, Opposite Ajmal Road, Malviya Road, Vile Parle East, Mumbai 400057 +91 9833235386 support@samartheyecare.org Copyright@ 2024 Samarth eye care & Laser center All rights reserved | Privacy Policy Call Now Appointment
